allowed_tools.description: Overrides allowed_tools. Omit to keep the prior value.

body.description: Full new body. Mutually exclusive with `edits`.

compatibility.description: Overrides the `compatibility` frontmatter (max 500 chars). Omit to keep the prior value.

description.description: Overrides the prior description (1–1024 chars, non-empty). Omit to keep the prior value.

edits.description: Structured edits. Each `old` must match exactly once in the current body / file.

items.description: A single find/replace edit applied to body or a file's content.

file_path.description: Apply this edit to a companion file instead of the body. Null/omitted = body edit.

old.description: Text to locate (must match exactly once).

license.description: Overrides the `license` frontmatter. Omit to keep the prior value.

metadata.description: Overrides the metadata map. Omit to keep the prior value.
